about.title: About
about.tagline:
Psych grad turned dev.
I build products designed for their users.

halterofit.name: Halterofit
halterofit.description: Mobile workout tracking application. Fast logging, 1300+ exercise library, works offline with cloud sync.

blundermate.name: BlunderMate
blundermate.description: Chess AI engine built in Prolog. Uses Negamax search with Alpha-Beta pruning and piece-square table heuristics for position evaluation.

chainride.name: ChainRide
chainride.description: Decentralized car rental DApp on Ethereum with UUPS upgradeable contracts.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: Interested in my profile? Feel free to reach out.
